items.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code of where the project is located and being developed
English short name of where the project is located and being developed
M49 geographical region code of where the project is located and being developed
M49 geographical region code corresponding English name of where the project is located and being developed
Mailing address line 1 of where the project is located and being developed. Adherence to the ISO 19160 standard should be followed
Mailing address line 2 of where the project is located and being developed. Adherence to the ISO 19160 standard should be followed

If a project doesn't have an address that neatly aligns with the ISO 19160 standard or is only partially available, use this 'alternative address' field to include relevant address related information

ISO 3166-2 country subdivision name of where the project is located and being developed
The city where the project is located and being developed
The postal code where the project is located and being developed

The project's identification code.

project_description.description: Description of the mitigation activities undertaken by the project, preferably the registry’s public description.

project_design_document_link.description: The link to the project's project design documentation (PDD).

items.description: If relevant, any approved deviations from methodology requirements granted by the registry.

program_type.description: If referring to a program of activities, specify the type of program.

items.description: If the project (activity) is part of a broader program of activities, specify which type of project the activity is.
The type of offset the project is expected to generate.
The sector in which the project is developed and the mitigation activities conducted.
The emission reduction or sequestration pathway of project.

current_registry_project_link.description: The link to the project on its current registry.

project_status.description: The current status of the project.

project_status_updated_at.description: The date of the current status of the project

number_of_crediting_periods.description: The total number of crediting periods assigned to the project over its lifetime as defined by the methodology or registry.

items.description: The duration (in years) of each crediting period granted to the project under the applicable methodology or registry.

project_registration_date.description: The date the project was registered on the registry.

project_list_date.description: The date the project was first listed on a registry.

items.description: The type(s) of additional project documentation.
The link(s) to the project's additional project documentation.

project_developer_phone.description: The phone number of the primary developer of the project.

file created on.description: Time stamp for when file was created

file edited on.description: Time stamp for when file was edited

file deleted on.description: Time stamp for when file was deleted

items.description: Area type of GIS file
The name of the carbon crediting program issuing the project's credits
The name of the standard associated with the project's credits.

initial_standard_version.description: The version of the standard under which the project was initially registered.

current_standard_version.description: The version of the standard under which the project is currently registered.

items.description: The methodology that the project is following.
The version of the methodology initially used for the first credit issuance.
The version of the methodology currently being used.
The link to the documentation for the current methodology being used.

origin_registry.description: The name of the project's original registry (if it has moved registries)

current_registry.description: The name of the project's current registry.

items.description: Select which crediting program(s) the project has recieved or seeking/has receieved or sought credits from
Registration number for project under other crediting program
Date the project has been rejected by another crediting program
Program name(s), reason(s) and date of rejection

current_project_issuance_registry.description: Registry in which the project is currently issuing under

validation_body_name.description: The name of the validation body that validated the project (if applicable).

validation_date.description: The date on which the project was validated (if applicable).

validation_report.description: The link to the project's validation report (if applicable).

items.description: The estimated annual credit generation of the project before starting issuance, per year of the project lifetime
Each year aligned with forecast annual issuance

estimated_crediting_period_start.description: Estimated end year of issuance period

estimated_crediting_period_end.description: Estimated first year of issuance period, historical if an established project

items.description: The forecasted total lifetime credit generation volume of the project
Global unique identifier for the batch of credits issued
link to the issuance page on registry
The date that credits were issued
The date that the issued credits were verified
Start date of credit verification period
End date of credit verification period
the total volume of credits issued in batch

cumulative_issued_volume.description: the total volume of credits issued to date

issuance_status.description: Indicate the status of project issuance

Project_Identifier.description: Global unique identifier for the project

items.description: The organizational name of project's auditor (e.g., VBB)
End date for Auditor (e.g., VVB) site visit
Start date for Auditor (e.g., VVB) site visit
Enter the link to the auditor's verification report
Enter the date the verification report was issued
list of attestations (e.g, child labor, labor worker attestation), if verified credentials are supported

carbon_concession_contract_length.description: Indicate whether the concession contract is at least the same length as the crediting period

carbon_credit_ownership_attestation.description: Indicate possession of carbon credit ownership documentation

carbon_credit_ownership_documentation.description: Enter the link to the contract of ownership.

child_labor_attestation.description: Project complies with age-related legal frameworks. Indicates compliance with the ILO Convention 138 Minimum Age Convention 1973 and/or national labor laws related to minimum age

child_labor_documentation.description: Evidence of compliance with age-related legal frameworks and ILO Convention 148 Minimum Age Convention 1973 and/or national labor laws related to minimum age

community_frameworks.description: Summarize measures taken to comply with frameworks governing the rights of Indigenous, tribal, and local communities

cultural_site_borders.description: The project site includes or borders archaeological sites or districts listed in national or international registries of historical or cultural significance

cultural_site_designation.description: Registry recognition of cultral site designation

labor_worker_attestation.description: Statement of compliance with international standards-compliant code of conduct or other labor rights documentation

labor_worker_documentation.description: Enter the link to evidence of international standards-compliant code of conduct or other labor rights documentation

land_right_attestation.description: Indicate the possesion of evidence of land rights

land_rights_documentation.description: Enter the link to evidence of land rights

land_ownership_attestation.description: Indicate the possesion of evidence of land ownership

legal_compliance_attestation.description: Indicate posession of legal compliance documentation and of explanation of how legislation informed and/or influenced project design

legal_compliance_documentation.description: Enter the link to the statement of compliance with all applicable national laws

previous_project_crediting_program.description: Indicate whether project is receiving or seeking credit for reductions and removals under another crediting program, or has done previously

project_governance_structure.description: How the project is governed; all stakeholders involved and systems that guide the organization's decision-making and operations

public_comment.description: Indicate whether there has been any public comment on the project

public_comment_summary.description: Summary of outcomes of public comment procress

items.description: List all landowners within project activity, such as farmers

Describe an overview of the team leads' experience and technical expertise, the details and results of projects the organization(s)has developed (if applicable), and any other significant historical aspects of the Project Proponent organization. Carbon credit owners details is the minimum requirement for this field.
Organization role. Carbon credit owners details is the minimum requirement for this field.
Full-time and part-time employees and contractors who directly work on the project. Carbon credit owners details is the minimum requirement for this field.
Full-time and part-time employees who work at the organization (not directly on the project)
Organization founding year. Carbon credit owners details is the minimum requirement for this field.
Summarize your organization’s purpose, values, and goals related to climate action. Carbon credit owners details is the minimum requirement for this field.
Legal entity name of the organisation. Carbon credit owners details is the minimum requirement for this field.
The total number of projects developed/owned/invested in by the organization. Carbon credit owners details is the minimum requirement for this field.
A verified URL for information about the organization. Carbon credit owners details is the minimum requirement for this field.
